rationale: Both candidates correctly reproduce the thread's diagnosis (base tokenizer lacks extended ratio tokens, moe.yaml wrongly forces the AR stage post-#2713, DiT config workaround confirmed by FayeSpica) and correctly note Gaohan123's request to track the fix in a new issue. X grounds slightly deeper — citing the downstream `_all_ratio_ids` builder, both yaml headers, and offering both a graceful-degrade fix (mirroring Tencent's actual guard behavior) and a fail-fast guard — while being explicit about its own hardware limitation. Y is comparably complete but cites a placeholder/fabricated comment URL ('#issuecomment-...') which undercuts its grounding, and its single raise-only fix is less aligned with Tencent's reference behavior than X's dual approach.
